coaches.description:
psev has 100s of hours in coaching individuals, as well as team environments. He can do vods, live coaching, documents, anything you'd like. Mechanics, gamesense, just pick what you would like and click his icon to book him.
Primary focus: Mechanics, Hitscan, Support

Champ Hitscan/Support Player with thousands of hours of successful coaching and VOD reviews for ranked specific gameplay.
In Depth Dissections into Micro and execution, deep structured layouts as well as strategy and mental awareness.  Proven track record of building players into monsters.

packagesContactLabel: Contact us for a custom quote

testimonials.name: Deign
testimonials.quote: Psev is an Overwatch wizard. He is fantastic at explaining the high level concepts of OW in a way that is easy to understand. His understanding of this game, not just of the moment to moment decisions, but in the abstract, is incredible. He’s probably saved me months or years of toiling.

testimonials.name: Jude
testimonials.quote:
Been working w/ sev for a while now and have been extremely satisfied with the services thus far. If you need game 
sense and/or  need to work on your in-game aim, sev’s ur guy
